dailyTheme: Field note: the town keeps a record of what people stop saying out loud.
postObjective: Reconnect creative audience with the Vallen archive.
audience: Listeners, readers, and supporters of What the Town Keeps.
voiceGuidelines: Cinematic, intimate, atmospheric, archive-like, emotionally grounded.
visualStyle: Rainy town, paper archive, muted blue-gray and warm interior light.
